text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Asia/Kolkata is UTC + 5:30, so the time difference is 15:30 hours ahead.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 02:00 + 15:30 = 17:30.
3. Since the addition doesn't cross a day boundary, the date remains December 10, 1054.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:30 on December 10, 1054
